changes.title: Dark mode
changes.detail: Components now support dark mode. This is experimental while we gather feedback. Try it in your service and share what you learn, it will help shape the production version.

changes.title: Accordion actions slot and filled heading
changes.detail: Added support for an actions slot in the Accordion header, plus a new headingType property that can be set to "filled".

changes.title: Badges in the Work Side Menu Item
changes.detail: Added a trailingContent slot so you can place badges in a work side menu item.

changes.title: Consistent file upload validation
changes.detail: Invalid uploaded files now render consistently as FileUploadCard components, including their validation error states.

changes.title: Interactive components no longer close their parent
changes.detail: Fixed bubbling close events, so using a popover, date picker, dropdown, or drawer inside a parent component no longer closes the parent.

changes.title: Temporary Notification progress indicators
changes.detail: Progress and indeterminate notification types now render their progress indicators correctly.

changes.title: Visual design refinements
changes.detail: Container, Drawer, and Dropdown were updated to better match the latest visual design.

changes.title: Documentation updates
bullets: Corrected all React and Angular property and event documentation.
Added documentation for the Notification Panel component.
Added a new "Updating your product" guide.
Fixed the Work Side Menu "with user profile" example to include the profile menu.
